subtitle: Tier 3 generative UI science learning app - verified, sandboxed, interactive artifacts
generated_for: image/diagram generation input, not authoritative documentation

style_hints.layout: top-to-bottom, three horizontal bands: Client, Backend, Data/External

palette.gate: #ea580c (orange) - the delivery gate, a hard structural checkpoint

components.label: Chat UI
components.description: SSE consumer; renders streamed text_delta events token by token

components.label: Artifact Card
components.description: Container for the generated interactive artifact and its staged-progress UI

components.label: iframe sandbox="allow-scripts" srcdoc
components.description: Generated HTML/JS artifact runtime. Cross-origin by construction (srcdoc + no allow-same-origin). Cannot touch parent DOM, cookies, or storage.

components.label: /library
components.description: Cache browser: lets a user browse previously generated, verified artifacts

components.label: API layer (SSE emitter)
components.description: POST /api/ask entry point; multiplexes text branch and artifact branch events onto one SSE response

components.label: LangGraph pipeline
components.description: Router forks into a fast text branch and a slower artifact branch

subcomponents.label: Explainer
subcomponents.role: streams conversational text answer, text branch only

subcomponents.label: Planner
subcomponents.role: produces the artifact plan: equations and behavior contract

subcomponents.label: Generator
subcomponents.role: the Tier 3 core; writes the self-contained HTML/JS artifact

subcomponents.label: Verifier
subcomponents.role: independently recomputes physics/science; pass or fail verdict; only source of the delivery-gate type

subcomponents.label: Post-processor
subcomponents.role: deterministic fixups after a verifier pass

components.label: Delivery gate
components.description: artifact_done events are constructed exclusively by deliver_verified_artifact(report: PassedVerifierReport). PassedVerifierReport is only instantiable by the verifier module on a pass verdict - bypassing verification is a type error, not a code-review catch.

components.label: traces
components.description: run_id, node, model, prompt_version, input_hash, output_hash, tokens_in/out, cost, latency_ms, verdict

components.label: Claude API
components.description: model calls for Router, Explainer, Planner, Generator, Verifier, Tutor

connections.label: one trace row per node call

notes.outbound_iframe_policy: Parent never posts into the iframe. Remix/reset = remount with new srcdoc, never a live postMessage into the sandbox.
notes.no_allow_same_origin: sandbox is allow-scripts only, never allow-same-origin - this is a hard rule (CLAUDE.md), not a tunable default.
notes.single_active_iframe: Only the active, viewport-visible, most recent artifact iframe stays mounted; history artifacts render as static Playwright-captured screenshots until clicked.

pipeline_conditional_edges.condition: fail and retry_count < 2 (retry with revision context)

sequence_example.scenario: cache miss with one verifier retry

steps.action: constructs artifact_done (html) - only possible on PassedVerifierReport

eviction_triggers: model_version bump (lazy: served stale until re-requested, then regenerated)
caching.dedup_scope_v1: exact-key only; semantic/embedding dedup is a later optimization, not built in v1

failure_taxonomy.user_experience: one silent retry, then counts as verifier fail
text + honest degrade card + retry button
degrade card + retry; auto-flag artifact in cache
idempotent replay from last event id (v1: simple restart of request)

hard_rules: No unverified artifact may reach the client - the delivery path must be structurally unable to bypass the Verifier.
Generated code libraries served from /vendor/ (same origin), never a runtime CDN fetch.
No predefined component library for learning artifacts - Tier 3 generation or degrade to text.
